name: Slipped at work but I'm partly to blame, can I still get paid in West Valley City?
description: Yes via workers' comp; lawsuits reduced if under 50% at fault.

mainEntity.name: Slipped at work but I'm partly to blame, can I still get paid in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes via workers' comp; lawsuits reduced if under 50% at fault.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers' compensation benefits apply even if partially at fault since no fault needed.** For third-party claims, Utah/Idaho modified comparative negligence bars recovery only if over 50% at fault.[1][3][5] Key factors: Your award reduces by your fault percentage in lawsuits. Comp covers medical/lost wages fully. Document everything to counter fault arguments. Avoid admitting blame early. A lawyer maximizes recovery despite shared fault.
